title: InfrastructureLineageIndex
description: Sealed causal chain index for a root declaration in the Seam infrastructure domain. Instantiates the abstract DomainLineageIndex from core.ontai.dev. One instance is created per root declaration by the InfrastructureLineageController. Controller-authored exclusively: the admission webhook rejects writes from any principal other than the designated controller service account (CLAUDE.md Section 14 Decision 3). Lineage Index Pattern: one instance per root, not per derived object (CLAUDE.md Section 14 Decision 4).

spec.description: Spec of the InfrastructureLineageIndex. Set by the InfrastructureLineageController. rootBinding is immutable after admission.

domainRef.description: Traceability link from the infrastructure domain to the domain core. When present, must equal infrastructure.core.ontai.dev. Validated by the admission webhook at CREATE time.

rootBinding.description: Identifies the root declaration that anchors this lineage index. Immutable after creation.

rootKind.description: Kind of the root declaration (e.g., TalosCluster, PackExecution).

rootUID.description: UID of the root declaration at time of lineage index creation.

rootObservedGeneration.description: metadata.generation of the root declaration when this index was created.

descendants.description: Registry of all objects derived from the root declaration. Entries are appended monotonically as new derived objects are created. Entries are never modified or removed.

governingOperator.description: Name of the Seam operator that owns the root declaration type (e.g., platform, guardian, wrapper, conductor).

observedGeneration.description: Last generation of the InfrastructureLineageIndex that the controller has processed.

conditions.description: Standard Kubernetes condition array for this resource.

DescendantEntry.description: A single derived object in the lineage derivation tree.

relationship.description: Relationship type from the root declaration to this derived object (e.g., generates, triggers, references).

creationRationale.description: Controlled vocabulary value from the Seam Core CreationRationale enumeration (pkg/lineage).
